name: Savory Zucchini Muffins WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Wrap shredded zucchini in a clean kitchen towel and gently squeeze out excess liquid.
3. In a large bowl, combine zucchini, all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, shredded cheese, baking powder, baking soda, black pepper, and salt. Mix until well combined.
4. In another bowl, whisk together yogurt, eggs, vegetable oil, and dried fines herbs. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry mixture and stir until just blended.
5. Grease a 12-cup muffin pan with cooking spray. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1 Fat, 1/2 Protein, 1/2 Vegetable, 1-1/2 Breads
Optional Calories: 30
Nutritional Analysis per serving:
